reasons: Senior commit-range code review requires static tracing across multiple changed files.

Request explicitly targets security-sensitive behavior: encrypted PDF password semantics, plaintext-at-rest guarantees, process environment leakage, subprocess lifecycle, and packaging guard validity.
Findings must meet a high confidence threshold with exact line citations and reproduction steps, so independent model review is warranted.
decision.panel_brief: Review the supplied R5 diff for concrete newly introduced defects only. Focus on encrypted PDF permission/password semantics, plaintext-at-rest guarantees, process environment leakage/inheritance, QThread/QProcess cleanup races, optimize-copy encryption preservation, and wheel/sdist guard validity. Reject pre-existing issues, intentional behavior, style/nits, and claims under 80/100 confidence; return a concise ranked findings list with exact changed file/line citations and reproduction steps, or state no findings.

errors: panel: Fusion requires at least two usable candidates (claude[0]=error, claude[1]=error, antigravity[0]=error, antigravity[1]=error)
